creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
- Update 0.67 -> 0.90b with more stability and more features. For
example, "Ignore List" was supported finally! :)

- A patch distributed by Takuo KITAME <kitame@northeye.org> is now
introduced instead of mine for Japanese messaging support. Here I'd
like to express my respect and thanks to him for his work.

- Message catalogs for several languages (including Japanese, of
course) are now ready to install. :)

- Currently you cannot read Japanese characters in a user profile nor
include them in yours since they will not show correctly. :(

-- 
Akinori MUSHA aka knu <knu@idaemons.org> (ICQ number:1684809)

How-To-Repeat: 
	Apply the attached patch against the current port. And if my
PR tagged as port/16252 will not seem to be committed soon, please
change the extension of the distribution patch (i.e. .bz2) to .gz and
run `make makesum'. Thanks.
